title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.070 - State auditor to have access to all records, confidentiality
text:
217.070.  State auditor to have access to all records, confidentiality. — The state auditor shall have access to all records maintained and established by the department.  Any confidential records shall not be divulged in such a way  as* to reveal personally identifiable information.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1196 § 17) 
*Word "as" does not appear in original rolls.
